notFound.message: Our team of experts is working hard to complete this section. Please check back soon as we prepare for MIANU-SM III!

meta.title: MIANU-SM III | MUN Conference
meta.description: Join MIANU-SM III, the premier Model United Nations conference at College Saint-Marc, Alexandria in October 2025.

committees.pageDescription: Explore the committees and topics that will be debated at MIANU-SM III.

inscription.title: Register for MIANU-SM III
inscription.subtitle: Join us for this unique diplomatic experience at College Saint-Marc in October 2025.
inscription.delegateDescription: For participants who wish to represent a country in a committee.
inscription.viceDescription: For participants who wish to assist as a vice-president.
inscription.institutionDescription: For Foreign schools that wish to register a group of participants.

additionalInfo.contact: For any questions, please contact us at equipemianu@gmail.com

easterEgg.title: Exclusive Preview of MIANU-SM III
easterEgg.description: Congratulations! You've discovered an exclusive preview of our upcoming conference. MIANU-SM III promises to be our most ambitious edition yet, with innovative committees and exciting debates on current global issues.

equipe.title: Our Team | MIANU-SM III
equipe.subtitle: The faces behind the conference
equipe.mysteryMessage: The identities of the MIANU-SM III team members remain confidential until the official opening of the conference. Stay tuned to discover who is behind this exceptional edition.

secretariat.bio: The Secretary General leads the conference with vision and determination.
The first Deputy Secretary General supports the conference ensures smooth operations.
Similar to the first Deputy Secretary General, The Second Deputy Secretary General plays a crucial role in the conference's operations.

leadership.bio: MUN veterans, the Chiefs of The Academic Committee lead the Presidency of the Conference committees and ensure that the academic aspect of MIANU is well managed.
MUN veterans, the Chiefs of The Academic Committee lead the Presidency of the Conference committees and ensure that the academic aspect of MIANU is well managed.

organization.bio: Ensuring the conference runs smoothly behind the scenes with meticulous planning and execution.

specialTeams.bio: Leading the digital transformation and media presence of the conference.
Directing the press team that documents and reports on conference proceedings with journalistic excellence.

quote.text: Behind every great conference is an even greater team.
quote.author: Anonymous

equipe.culturalMystery: An enigmatic role whose exact nature remains classified...
